identity.name: Muhammad
identity.title: Full-Stack Developer & Security Researcher
identity.bio: A self-taught engineer focused on building secure, high-performance web applications and virtualization layers. Experienced in infrastructure hardening, CVE scanning, and full-stack deployment.

details: Architected a secure IT training platform from the ground up.
Implemented custom PHP/MySQL backend for user certification.
Managed on-premise server security and network optimization.
Developed Python-based dashboards for managing server-grade Xeon hardware.
Configured complex virtualized environments using KVM and Libvirt.
